message:
fix: guard auto-import against nil pointer panic in dolt-native mode

In dolt-native mode, there is no JSONL file to import. Both auto-import
code paths (autoImportIfNewer and checkAndAutoImport) were calling into
the Dolt backend without checking sync mode first. When the Dolt backend
connection was in a degraded state, GetStatistics panicked with a nil
pointer dereference on s.db.

Add ShouldImportJSONL() to check sync mode from the database config and
skip JSONL auto-import when in dolt-native mode. This is the import-side
counterpart to the existing ShouldExportJSONL() guard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
